action: Validate Product/ProductGroup schema, sitemap canonicals, index coverage, rendered HTML and Merchant Center feed health.
expected_outcome: Blockers list with severity, owner and fix path.

action: Build an AI-search-ready Apparel hub with buyer questions, use-cases, comparison tables and internal links.
expected_outcome: Non-brand category query coverage and richer category authority.

action: Improve titles/descriptions, GTIN/SKU coverage, product highlights, shipping, return policy and high-quality images.
expected_outcome: Higher product data completeness and shopping eligibility.

action: Define index/noindex/canonical rules for size, color, activity, price, sort and campaign parameters.
expected_outcome: Reduced crawl waste and duplicate URL risk.

action: Create Power BI report for AI share of voice, conversational query coverage, product term gaps and competitor presence.
expected_outcome: Management visibility into AI-era search demand.

action: Join SEO landing pages to revenue, margin, stock and returns in Fabric.
expected_outcome: SEO priorities ranked by profit and operational risk.

action: Run A/B tests for category hub copy, PDP fit guidance, bundle messaging and FAQ modules.
expected_outcome: Measured lift in conversion, AOV and return reduction.

action: Change homepage H1 from the empty tag / 'HELMET REPLACEMENT PROGRAM' promo banner to the actual brand value proposition ('Push limits not luck' or equivalent) — verified via live crawl that this is the current state, not a hypothetical.
expected_outcome: Search engines read the correct primary topic for the homepage instead of a secondary promo section.

action: Add Organization + WebSite JSON-LD to the homepage and CollectionPage/BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to collection pages — verified via live crawl that these are currently absent while Product schema on PDPs is complete and correct.
expected_outcome: Closes the gap between the site's real UCP/agent layer and its on-page structured data; strengthens Knowledge Panel and sitelinks eligibility.

action: Backfill alt text on the ~80% of images missing it (verified: 29/35 homepage, 51/63 collection, 35/58 product page) — prioritize hero/product imagery first.
expected_outcome: Recovers Google Images discovery on gear photography and closes an accessibility gap.

action: Write unique meta descriptions for collection pages (verified missing on /collections/moto) instead of relying on Google's auto-generated snippet.
expected_outcome: Reclaims control of SERP snippet copy and CTR on category pages.

action: Investigate why sitemap_products_1.xml serves an identical lastmod (request-time timestamp) across all 1,199 sampled URLs rather than real per-product edit dates — file a fix request with the sitemap-generating app/theme if it's app-controlled, since Google may be discounting freshness signals from this sitemap entirely.
expected_outcome: Restores lastmod as a usable crawl-priority signal.

action: Correct Strict-Transport-Security max-age=0 (verified live) to a real duration (e.g. max-age=31536000) to match the includeSubDomains/preload flags already present — currently the header is a no-op.
expected_outcome: Actually enforces HTTPS-only as the preload/includeSubDomains flags imply; currently cosmetic only.
